pending.body:
finding_summary: `start_reserved_requirements_run` swaps `pending_requirements_run_id` from the startup sentinel to the final `run_id` before `draft_milestone_with_run_id` has created `requirements/<run_id>/run.json`. In that gap, `milestone show/status` fails with "pending requirements run ... could not be inspected", and a concurrent `milestone plan` clears the pointer as "run not found" and starts a second planner.
severity: high
affected_files: src/cli/milestone.rs:494-503, src/cli/milestone.rs:726-733, src/cli/milestone.rs:833-845, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs:201-213
remediation_hint: Keep the `__starting__:` reservation in `status.json` until the requirements run directory and initial `run.json` write are durable, or make run creation itself return the committed `run_id` before exposing it in milestone state.

finding_summary: A second `milestone plan` invocation automatically clears any `drafting` pending run older than five minutes, even though the first planner may still be inside a long backend stage. Because `run.updated_at` is only refreshed at stage boundaries before `invoke_stage(...).await`, a single slow research/synthesis/validation call can exceed the threshold and the second process will launch a duplicate requirements run.
severity: medium
affected_files: src/cli/milestone.rs:747-758, src/cli/milestone.rs:997-1002, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs:640-652, src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs:725-735
remediation_hint: Tie stale recovery to positive liveness evidence (pid/lease/heartbeat) rather than elapsed wall-clock time, or require an explicit operator override before replacing a `drafting` run.

finding_summary: New milestone planning runs are seeded from `record.description`, but successful materialization rewrites that field to the generated `executive_summary`. After the first successful plan, rerunning `milestone plan` no longer uses the original `--from-idea` prompt and can silently drop scope-defining context from subsequent replans.
severity: medium
affected_files: src/cli/milestone.rs:128-142, src/cli/milestone.rs:841-842, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:1414-1452
remediation_hint: Persist the original planning idea separately (for example `planning_idea`) and use that immutable field for new milestone-mode requirements runs, leaving the user-facing description free to track the current summary.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 8 -> Plan and Implement
